ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the complaint was created */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the complaint was closed */,
  "agency" INTEGER /* Agency responsible for handling the complaint */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "descriptor" TEXT /* Descriptor of the complaint */,
  "complaint_type" INTEGER /* Type of complaint */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution provided */,
  "resolution_action_updateddate" TEXT /* Last updated date of the resolution action */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code of the complaint location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the complaint originated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the complaint location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the complaint location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Formatted location of the complaint */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the complaint location */,
  "complainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the complaint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the complaint (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of any attachments submitted with the complaint */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up action is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up action is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_complaint_type FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_type") REFERENCES complaint_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the agency */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Noise - Street/Sidewalk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the complaint type (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint being resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution provided */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution was applied */,
  "resolving_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that handled the resolution */,
  "resolving_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who handled the resolution */,
  "resolution_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred in resolving the complaint */,
  "resolution_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level of the complainer with the resolution (e.g., satisfied, unsatisfied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_resolving_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolving_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_resolving_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolving_agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough (e.g., MANHATTAN) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zip code is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zip code in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zipcodes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., submitted complaint) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint being updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the update */,
  "update_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level of the complainer with the update (e.g., satisfied, unsatisfied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_updates_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_updates_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
